analysis.name: RENGA #21
analysis.description: A handcrafted collection of 10,000 characters developed by artist DirtyRobot. Each with their own identity to be discovered within the wider stories of RENGA. In its purest form, RENGA is the art of storytelling. Visit our [website](https://renga.app/) for more details.

verdicts.title: ON FRESH WHALE LIST
verdicts.description: Brand new wallet (3 days old) with $105,795,918 is being targeted by 8 different scam campaigns. This indicates the wallet address is on a 'fresh whale' list being sold to multiple attacker groups. Attackers know this wallet exists and have its address.
evidence: Multiple attacker groups targeting same wallet
Address likely leaked from exchange or tracked via mempool
verdicts.action: This wallet is being actively monitored by scammers - high-value target

verdicts.title: SCAM NFT AIRDROP DETECTED
verdicts.description: This wallet received an NFT from a scam domain impersonating Phantom wallet. The domain 'api.phantomnetworks.xyz' is designed to phish users.
verdicts.action: Do not interact with this NFT or visit the domain

verdicts.title: SCAM NFT AIRDROP DETECTED
verdicts.description: This wallet received an NFT from a scam domain impersonating Bored Ape Yacht Club. The domain 'api.azukibaycofficial.xyz' is designed to phish users.
evidence: Impersonating Azuki NFT collection NFT collection
Impersonating Bored Ape Yacht Club NFT collection
verdicts.action: Do not interact with this NFT or visit the domain

verdicts.action: Do not interact with this NFT or visit the domain

verdicts.title: CARPET BOMBING SCAM CAMPAIGN
verdicts.description: Wallet is being carpet bombed with 8 different scam NFT campaigns. Attackers have identified this wallet and are coordinating multiple phishing attempts. This pattern indicates the wallet is on a 'fresh whale' list being sold to scammers.
evidence: Likely on a 'fresh whale' list being sold
verdicts.action: High-priority target - multiple attacker groups know about this wallet

verdicts.title: IMPERSONATION PATTERN DETECTED
verdicts.description: Multiple domains (4) use the 'official' keyword to build false trust. This is a coordinated impersonation campaign targeting this wallet.
verdicts.action: All domains using 'official' are likely scams - do not trust

verdicts.title: SUSPICIOUS NFT AIRDROP
verdicts.description: This wallet received an NFT from suspicious domain 'api.louis-vuitton-official.top'. Likely a phishing or scam attempt.

verdicts.title: SUSPICIOUS NFT AIRDROP
verdicts.description: This wallet received an NFT from suspicious domain 'api.rich-baby-nfts.xyz'. Likely a phishing or scam attempt.

verdicts.title: LOW SOPHISTICATION TARGET
verdicts.description: Wallet shows limited DeFi knowledge but holds significant value. Basic phishing likely to succeed.

verdicts.title: HIGH-RISK TRADER PROFILE
verdicts.description: Wallet shows impulsive trading behavior with meme coin exposure. Likely susceptible to FOMO-based attacks.
verdicts.action: Target with urgency-based scams, fake alpha

verdicts.title: NO EXCHANGE TRAIL
verdicts.description: Large holder with no detected CEX interactions. Funds origin harder to trace. May be privacy-conscious or using DEX only.
verdicts.action: Trace funding source through on-chain analysis

verdicts.title: HTTP PROTOCOL USAGE
verdicts.description: Found 9 metadata URLs using HTTP instead of HTTPS. Legitimate NFT projects use HTTPS. HTTP indicates lazy scammers or intentional security bypass.
evidence: HTTP = scam indicator or lazy attacker
verdicts.action: HTTP URLs are highly suspicious - likely scam infrastructure
